subject: Technology
note: Achievement objectives from the New Zealand Curriculum. Strands: Technological Practice; Technological Knowledge; Nature of Technology.

objectives.subject: Technology
objectives.text: Develop a plan that identifies the outcome they are developing and the key features of that outcome; follow through to make an outcome

objectives.subject: Technology
objectives.text: Describe the nature and functions of everyday technological objects in their physical environment

objectives.subject: Technology
objectives.text: Develop a plan to identify the outcome they are developing; undertake testing to check that the outcome meets the brief; evaluate the outcome to improve future designs

objectives.subject: Technology
objectives.text: Understand how the form and function of technological products are related to the materials and processes used

objectives.subject: Technology
objectives.text: Develop specifications to guide and evaluate the development of an outcome; apply appropriate testing procedures and evaluate the outcome against design criteria

objectives.subject: Technology
objectives.text: Understand how properties of materials can be worked with and transformed to produce desired outcomes

objectives.subject: Technology
objectives.text: Develop a brief that includes specifications for the outcome and the constraints on its development; use iterative design processes to develop, test, and refine an outcome

objectives.subject: Technology
objectives.text: Understand programming concepts: sequencing, loops, conditions, variables; create programs that use these concepts to solve problems

objectives.subject: Technology
objectives.text: Develop and justify specifications and design criteria; use prototyping, testing, and evaluation to refine and communicate design decisions

objectives.subject: Technology
objectives.text: Understand and apply algorithms, data structures, and computational thinking to design and implement programs; consider social and ethical implications of digital systems
